description: Connection settings for the scripture lookup service, including the API key and which Bible translation to use per language. Use it to enable and configure in-app Bible passage lookups.

fields.description: Master switch. When unchecked, all Bible lookups raise a friendly error instead of calling the upstream API.
fields.label: Enabled

fields.description: Your api.bible API key (https://scripture.api.bible). Stored encrypted.
fields.label: API Key

fields.description: Base URL for api.bible (the /v1 prefix is required). Override only if api.bible changes their endpoint.
fields.label: Base URL

fields.description: Fallback Bible ID used when the user's language has no row in the Language Defaults table below.
fields.label: Default Bible ID

fields.description: Map each language the seminary serves to its preferred Bible. At lookup time, the user's interface language is matched against this table first; if no match, the Default Bible ID above is used.
fields.label: Language Defaults

name: Bible API Settings
